title: Joint Hyperparameter Optimization of a DWT-BiLSTM Architecture for Wind Speed Forecasting: A Systematic Comparison of Metaheuristic Algorithms with Component Ablation Analysis
description: Companion code, configurations, per-iteration trial-history databases, trained model checkpoints, and analysis outputs for a four-phase benchmark study of eight metaheuristic algorithms (ABC, GA, PSO, GWO, HO, FNO, Raindrop, TOA) on the joint 9-dimensional hyperparameter optimization of a DWT-BiLSTM hybrid wind-speed-forecasting architecture. Submitted to Knowledge-Based Systems (Elsevier). Raw wind-speed data are not included due to the data-sharing terms of the Turkish State Meteorological Service (MGM); aggregated result JSONs allow verification of every published number, figure, and table without access to the raw data.

creators.name: Bendeş, Emre
creators.affiliation: Nevşehir Hacı Bektaş Veli University, Department of Computer Engineering

notes: If you use this software or any of the result artefacts in your research, please cite the associated Knowledge-Based Systems manuscript (DOI to be added upon acceptance). Raw wind speed data may be requested directly from the Turkish State Meteorological Service (MGM) at https://mgm.gov.tr.
